message:
feat(vdbe): improve morsel dispatch E2E test fidelity and artifact capture

Enhance the bd-1rw.2 morsel dispatch E2E benchmark for more reliable
cross-environment reproducibility and CI artifact harvesting:

Vectorized dispatch test changes:
- Add configurable round count via synthetic_e2e_task_cost_with_rounds()
  to separate base-cost calibration (512 rounds) from E2E measurement
  (262,144 rounds) so throughput numbers are meaningful
- Generate compact single-line JSON artifact alongside pretty-printed
  version for machine parsing
- Emit MORSEL_E2E_ARTIFACT_JSON:<json> to stderr for inline capture
  by CI scripts without filesystem artifact dependency

E2E shell script improvements:
- Raise MIN_SPEEDUP from 0.60x to 2.00x (the old threshold was too
  permissive to detect real regressions)
- Move artifact output to target/test-results/bd-1rw.2/ instead of
  artifacts/ to follow cargo convention and avoid gitignoring
- Include run ID in artifact filename for multi-run differentiation
- Capture test output and parse inline artifact JSON from stderr,
  writing to artifact path as fallback when filesystem write fails
  inside rch remote execution
- Properly propagate environment variables through rch exec

Also updates beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -272,7 +272,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1r3d","title":"EPIC: RaptorQ decode proofs + explainability artifacts","description":"Implement spec expectations around decode failure explainability.

Spec essentials:
- When decoding fails, system produces explainable artifacts (DecodeProof / failure reasons).
- Proof artifacts must be replay-verifiable.

Epic closes when:
- decoder emits proof objects on failure;
- proof verification tooling exists;
- failure reasons are exposed in deterministic logs/reports.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-09T21:37:26.380964458Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T22:51:21.122826009Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T22:51:21.122801764Z","close_reason":"All decode-proof implementation and verification lanes are closed; parent epic complete","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1r3d","depends_on_id":"bd-1d2i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1r3d","depends_on_id":"bd-1hi","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1r3d","depends_on_id":"bd-221l","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1r3d","depends_on_id":"bd-3go","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1r3d","depends_on_id":"bd-awqq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1r3d","depends_on_id":"bd-faz4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1863,"issue_id":"bd-1r3d","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Epic Notes: Decode Proofs (Explainable Repair)

### Thesis
Repair without explanation is a correctness liability. Decode proofs make repairs auditable:
- what bytes did we trust?
- what did we reconstruct?
- why do we believe reconstruction is correct?

### Production vs Lab
- Production may keep proof emission off for performance.
- Lab/harness must enable proofs so failures are debuggable and regressions are attributable.

### Required Properties
- proof schema versioned
- verifier exists and catches mismatches
- proof does not leak raw page bytes by default (hashes + metadata)","created_at":"2026-02-09T22:00:07Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1rw","title":"Epic: VDBE Execution Engine","description":"Virtual Database Engine: 190+ opcodes, register-based VM, cursor management, sorter, aggregate engine. Morsel-driven parallelism (§8.2) for OLAP. Cranelift JIT compilation path for hot queries (§8.3).

## Success Criteria
Epic completion requires all child beads to satisfy their structured acceptance criteria, including explicit unit/property coverage, deterministic e2e evidence, and structured logging/metrics validation.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Every child bead in this epic defines concrete unit/property test scope with deterministic pass/fail thresholds and invariant IDs. 2. Critical-path end-to-end scenarios are implemented as reproducible e2e scripts (fixed seeds, replay commands, artifact bundles) across happy-path and adversarial-path behavior. 3. Structured logging and metrics contracts are mandatory for all child outputs (trace_id, run_id, scenario_id, seed, timing, outcome, error context) and validated by CI conformance checks. 4. Epic completion requires a machine-readable evidence manifest linking child unit/e2e/log artifacts to acceptance outcomes, plus an explicit fallback/rollback plan that preserves concurrent-writer defaults.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:57:49.310465041Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:07.932247942Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","epic","ev-gated","frankensqlite","vdbe"]}
 {"id":"bd-1rw.1","title":"Register-based VM with 190+ opcodes","description":"Register-based VM: 190+ opcodes, program counter, register file, cursor array. Opcode dispatch (threaded code or computed goto). Tracing: span 'vdbe_exec' with fields opcode_count, program_id, result_rows. Log level: TRACE per-opcode, DEBUG per-statement, INFO for slow queries (>100ms). Metric: fsqlite_vdbe_opcodes_executed_total counter, fsqlite_vdbe_statement_duration_seconds histogram.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. All 190+ SQLite opcodes implemented and tested. 2. Register-based dispatch < 10ns per opcode. 3. Correct results on full sqllogictest suite. 4. Memory usage bounded by configured limits.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:08.878795609Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T08:27:57.066370982Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T08:27:57.066341316Z","close_reason":"All acceptance criteria met: 190 opcodes defined (152 fully implemented, 38 advanced/optional stubs), program counter with fetch-execute loop, register file (1-indexed Vec<SqliteValue>), cursor array (MemCursor/SorterCursor/StorageCursor), match-based opcode dispatch, vdbe_exec tracing span with opcode_count/program_id/result_rows fields, TRACE-level per-opcode logging, DEBUG-level per-statement logging, INFO-level slow query logging (>100ms), fsqlite_vdbe_opcodes_executed_total counter, fsqlite_vdbe_statement_duration_seconds histogram approximation via cumulative microsecond counter.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl","vdbe"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1rw.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1rw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-1rw.2","title":"Morsel-driven parallel execution engine","description":"Morsel-driven parallelism (§8.2): Partition work into cache-sized morsels, schedule across worker threads. Implements exchange operators (hash partition, broadcast). Pipeline breakers at sort/aggregate boundaries. Tracing: span 'morsel_exec' with fields morsel_size, worker_id, pipeline_id. Log level: DEBUG morsel scheduling, INFO pipeline completion. Metric: fsqlite_morsel_throughput_rows_per_sec gauge, fsqlite_morsel_workers_active gauge.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Near-linear scaling to 4 cores on TPC-H Q1. 2. Deterministic results regardless of thread count. 3. Morsel size auto-tuned to L2 cache. 4. Exchange operators handle skewed data correctly.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CopperHill","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:08.929279534Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-20T00:05:36.392349197Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl","vdbe"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1rw.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1rw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1rw.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1rw.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":3028,"issue_id":"bd-1rw.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Claimed via bv robot triage as highest-impact unclaimed actionable task. Starting next slice: enforce real E2E scaling signal and remote-artifact correctness in morsel dispatcher verifier + dispatch workload, then re-validate with rch and publish fresh artifact metrics.","created_at":"2026-02-20T00:10:50Z"},{"id":3107,"issue_id":"bd-1rw.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Progress update (2026-02-20): completed robustness pass for deterministic morsel E2E verifier + scaling signal. Latest verifier run via rch: base=2613 tasks/s, 4-worker=9495 tasks/s, speedup=3.634x, checksum stable=0x4eb320ba1c3d8e7a, artifact=target/test-results/bd-1rw.2/morsel_dispatch_e2e_artifact_bd-1rw.2-seed-424242.json, sha256=3b918c8afbb43861938a33b6965e6cbdd816e3a02d9e9143ee41a870dac73528. Aggregate accumulator engine. Tracing: span 'sort' with fields rows_sorted, spill_pages, merge_runs. Log level: WARN on disk spill, DEBUG sort progress. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownCliff","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:09.035037588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-18T00:23:06.042562135Z","closed_at":"2026-02-18T00:23:06.042543369Z","close_reason":"External merge sort with spill-to-disk, sort metrics, tracing, 272 VDBE tests green","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl","vdbe"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1rw.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1rw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1rw.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":3048,"issue_id":"bd-1rw.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Implementation: Cursor Management, External Sorter & Aggregate Engine (BrownCliff)

### Summary
Enhanced the VDBE SorterCursor with external merge sort support: memory budget
tracking, spill-to-disk when threshold exceeded, and k-way merge of sorted
runs. Added sort-specific metrics (rows sorted, pages spilled) and tracing
observability (sort span, WARN on spill, DEBUG on merge).

### Changes

**`crates/fsqlite-vdbe/Cargo.toml`**
- Moved `tempfile` from dev-dependencies to dependencies (needed for
  production spill-to-disk support)

**`crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/engine.rs`**
- Enhanced `SorterCursor` struct with external sort fields:
  - `memory_used: usize` — estimated bytes consumed by in-memory rows
  - `spill_threshold: usize` — configurable limit before spill (default 100 MiB)
  - `spill_runs: Vec<SpillRun>` — sorted runs flushed to temp files
  - `rows_sorted_total: u64` and `spill_pages_total: u64` for metrics
- New `SpillRun` struct: path, record_count, bytes_written per run
- New `RunIterator` enum: file-backed or in-memory run iterator for k-way merge
- `SorterCursor::insert_row()`: tracks memory, triggers spill when threshold hit
- `SorterCursor::spill_to_disk()`: sorts batch, writes length-prefixed records
  to temp file, emits WARN tracing log
- `SorterCursor::sort()`: fast path for pure in-memory; merge path for disk runs
  via k-way tournament merge, cleans up temp files after merge
- `SorterCursor::reset()`: clears rows, position, memory, and temp files
- Updated `SorterInsert` opcode to use `insert_row()`
- Updated `SorterSort` opcode to propagate `Result` and flush metrics
- Updated `ResetSorter` opcode to use `reset()`
- Added `FSQLITE_SORT_ROWS_TOTAL` and `FSQLITE_SORT_SPILL_PAGES_TOTAL` atomic counters
- Extended `VdbeMetricsSnapshot` with `sort_rows_total` and `sort_spill_pages_total`
- Added `tracing::debug_span!("sort", ...)` in SorterSort handler
- 8 new tests:
  - test_sort_metrics_emitted_on_sorter_sort
  - test_sorter_spill_to_disk_under_low_threshold
  - test_sorter_reset_cleans_spill_state
  - test_sorter_desc_key_order_with_external_merge
  - test_sorter_multi_column_key_with_mixed_order
  - test_sorter_memory_estimation
  - test_sorter_empty_sort
  - test_sorter_pure_inmemory_sort_path

### Test Results
- 272 VDBE tests passing (8 new, 264 existing)
- All quality gates green: cargo check, fmt
","created_at":"2026-02-18T00:23:00Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1rw.5","title":"Vectorized column-at-a-time execution with SIMD","description":"Vectorized execution (§8.2): Column-at-a-time processing within morsels. SIMD-accelerated filter/project/hash. Selection vectors for predicate evaluation. Integrates with morsel scheduling. Tracing: span 'vectorized_batch' with fields batch_size, selectivity, simd_path. Log level: DEBUG batch processing stats. Metric: fsqlite_vectorized_rows_total counter, fsqlite_vectorized_simd_utilization gauge.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. SIMD filter/project for integer/float columns. 2. Selection vector propagation through pipeline. 3. Vectorized results identical to scalar. 4. >2x throughput vs scalar on filter-heavy queries.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownCliff","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:09.084626616Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-18T00:29:56.878704196Z","closed_at":"2026-02-18T00:29:56.878684739Z","close_reason":"Vectorized filter/project/hash operators, metrics, SIMD detection, 292 VDBE tests green","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl","vdbe"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1rw.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1rw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1rw.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1rw.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":3049,"issue_id":"bd-1rw.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Implementation: Vectorized Column-at-a-Time Execution with SIMD (BrownCliff)

### Summary
Added vectorized operators (filter, project, hash) with auto-vectorization-
friendly tight loops, SIMD runtime detection, comprehensive metrics, and
tracing observability. Extended the existing Batch type with a `from_columns`
constructor for operator composition.

### Changes

**`crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/lib.rs`**
- Added `pub mod vectorized_ops;` module declaration

**`crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/vectorized.rs`**
- Added `Batch::from_columns()` constructor for operator-produced batches
- Added vectorized metrics infrastructure:
  - `FSQLITE_VECTORIZED_ROWS_TOTAL` atomic counter
  - `FSQLITE_VECTORIZED_SIMD_UTILIZATION_MILLI` atomic gauge
  - `VectorizedMetricsSnapshot` with both fields
  - `vectorized_metrics_snapshot()` and `reset_vectorized_metrics()`
  - `record_vectorized_rows()` and `set_vectorized_simd_utilization()` helpers
- Added SIMD runtime detection:
  - `simd_avx2_available()` — runtime AVX2 check via `is_x86_feature_detected!`
  - `simd_sse2_available()` — runtime SSE2 check
  - `simd_path_label()` — returns "avx2"/"sse2"/"scalar" for tracing

**`crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/vectorized_ops.rs`** (NEW — 530 lines)
- `CompareOp` enum: Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge
- `filter_batch_int64()` — Int64 column comparison filter with selection vector
- `filter_batch_float64()` — Float64 column comparison filter
- `project_batch()` — column subset extraction preserving selection
- `hash_batch_columns()` — per-row FNV-1a hash over selected columns
- All operators emit `vectorized_batch` tracing span with batch_size,
  selectivity, simd_path fields
- All operators record `vectorized_rows_total` metrics
- Hash operator updates `simd_utilization` gauge
- 20 tests covering all operators, edge cases, metrics, SIMD detection

### Test Results
- 292 VDBE tests passing (20 new, 272 existing)
- All quality gates green: cargo check, fmt
